title: Sour Crumbly Vietnamese Charlotte Potatoes Salad
description: A refreshing sour and crumbly salad featuring Charlotte potatoes, pickled vegetables, and fragrant herbs. Perfect for a date-night dinner.

ingredients.name: Charlotte potatoes
ingredients.notes: Choose potatoes with rough, brown skin for the best texture

ingredients.name: Carrots
ingredients.notes: Grate carrots for a more uniform texture

ingredients.name: Cucumber
ingredients.notes: Slice cucumber thinly for better texture

ingredients.name: Palm sugar
ingredients.notes: Dissolve palm sugar in fish sauce for a balanced flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh cilantro
ingredients.notes: Chop cilantro for a fragrant flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh mint leaves
ingredients.notes: Chop mint for a refreshing flavor

ingredients.name: Pickle
ingredients.notes: Use store-bought or homemade pickled vegetables for added crunch

ingredients.name: Crushed peanuts
ingredients.notes: Use for added texture and flavor

instructions: Boil a large pot of water and cook the Charlotte potatoes until tender.
Drain the potatoes and let them cool to room temperature.
Grate the carrots and slice the cucumber thinly.
In a large bowl, combine grated carrots, sliced cucumber, and pickled vegetables.
Dissolve palm sugar in fish sauce and mix with fermented rice vinegar, sugar, and a pinch of salt.
Pour the dressing over the vegetables and mix well.
Chop fresh cilantro and mint leaves and sprinkle over the salad.
Top the salad with crushed peanuts and serve immediately.
